reviews.comment:
Uena hoteleria rutera. Muy buena ubicaxion. Limpio confortable. Muy buen servicio y comida en el restaurante y la confitería. En resúmen, un lugar óptimo para escala de ruta. Para los aficionados, enfrente está el Casino.

(Translated by Google)
Good roadside hotel. Excellent location. Clean and comfortable. Very good service and food in the restaurant and confectionery. In short, an ideal place to stop along the route. For those interested in gambling, the Casino is right across the street.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3528909386919944725/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRbnVHaV9RRRAB
